title: Hadoop MapReduce Job History Management
description: This Hadoop MapReduce architecture ensures job history data integrity via committer operations, secure job operations with delegation tokens. Components like AvroArrayUtils.java, HistoryEventHandler.java, and HistoryViewerPrinter.java illustrate separation of concerns. The 'task/reduce' directory, with ExceptionReporter.java and ShuffleScheduler.java, manages the reduce phase. Utility classes in 'util' directory enhance usability. This hierarchical structure demonstrates shared responsibility, collaboration, and clear architectural roles, promoting maintainability, extensibility, and secure operations. Technologies used include Java, Avro, and Hadoop MapReduce framework. Quality attributes achieved include scalability, reliability, and security.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Job History Management

DESCRIPTION: This Hadoop MapReduce architecture ensures job history data integrity via committer operations, secure job operations with delegation tokens. Components like AvroArrayUtils.java, HistoryEventHandler.java, and HistoryViewerPrinter.java illustrate separation of concerns. The 'task/reduce' directory, with ExceptionReporter.java and ShuffleScheduler.java, manages the reduce phase. Utility classes in 'util' directory enhance usability. This hierarchical structure demonstrates shared responsibility, collaboration, and clear architectural roles, promoting maintainability, extensibility, and secure operations. Technologies used include Java, Avro, and Hadoop MapReduce framework. Quality attributes achieved include scalability, reliability, and security.
